name: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc.
description: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. is a global leader in cloud-delivered protection of endpoints, cloud workloads, identity, and data. The company's Falcon platform leverages artificial intelligence and real-time indicators of attack to provide sophisticated threat detection and automated response. By unifying next-generation antivirus, endpoint detection and response (EDR), and a 24/7 managed hunting service, CrowdStrike offers a comprehensive security solution that stops breaches. Its cloud-native architecture enables seamless scalability and rapid deployment across diverse enterprise environments, securing critical infrastructure for organizations worldwide.
